## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue in the prompt structure)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds new AI capabilities/templates)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing prompts to behave differently)
- [ ] This change requires a documentation update

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own markdown/templates
- [ ] I have commented my templates, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new AI hallucination risks
